query_name: 検証_ビンゴ達成者数_デジ戦TBL
query_string:
select
  count(distinct customer_id) as bingo_customer_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 1 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_1_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 2 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_2_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 3 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_3_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 4 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_4_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 5 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_5_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 6 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_6_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 7 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_7_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 8 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_8_complete_uu
  , count(distinct if(bingo_ticket_mission_id = 9 and status = 1, customer_id)) as bingo_9_complete_uu
from
  bingo_ticket_mission_status
where
  customer_id in (select distinct customer_id from bingo_ticket_mission_status where substr(created, 1, 10) between '2025-11-17' and '2026-02-02')
  and (completed_date is null or substr(completed_date, 1, 10) between '2025-11-17' and '2026-02-02')
